prompt: This stores an uploaded file. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Base64-encode the file before storing it
Validate the file type/content, generate a server-side filename, and store outside the web root with no execute permission
Set the upload size limit to 10 MB
Append a .txt suffix only in the displayed URL

explanation: Validating type/content + a server-generated name + storage outside an executable web root prevents an attacker turning an upload into a runnable web shell (CWE-434). A size limit is good hygiene but does not stop a malicious file type; the others are cosmetic.
